item.title: MAGA PASTOR Kevin Jones Who Wore Charlie Kirk’s “FREEDOM” Shirt In Sermon Arrested For Soliciting Minors.
item.description: West Virginia news confirms Pastor Kevin Curtis Jones of Summit Church in Elkins was arrested for soliciting a minor via computer and distributing child exploitation material, with charges filed recently. NOT A DRAG QUEEN NOT TRANSGENDER NOT AN IMMIGRANT

item.dc:creator: SkaTim

item.title: The story of the best man I know who adopted one of my kittens
item.description:
In May of 2022 I had the Friends Litter. Six kittens, named after Rachel, Phoebe, Monica, Joey, Chandler, and Ross. Little Joey here was easily my favorite.
I often talk about how I spend my Saturdays, at my dad’s house watching sports and day drinking. It’s called Dadurday and it is super fun and something I look forward to every week.
But it’s not just me and my dad. It’s me, my dad, and this amazing guy named Rich. Just the three of us. Every week.
Rich is an Army guy, and my dad latched onto him. My dad is a retired three star general and Rich was his XO. He was so good at his job, my dad requested him every time we moved. Rich followed us EVERYWHERE, all throughout the world. He has been in my life since 1994 when I was 10 years old. He literally watched me grow up.
Rich came to me one Dadurday in 2022 and said he and his son wanted to adopt a kitten. Who better to go to than me??
I trotted out all the kittens and they chose Joey.
His son named him Bones (I will reserve judgement on that name haha)
And Bones is living his absolute BEST life.
Rich is literally the best man I have ever met. I am honored and blessed to call him a friend. So smart, so thoughtful, so kind, so funny, with the quickest wit and largest breadth of knowledge of anyone I’ve ever seen.
I cannot IMAGINE a better home for Joey. He is so freaking lucky Dadurday is tomorrow and I am so looking forward to it, as always. I asked Rich to send me some pics of Joey/Bones tonight, but he doesn’t know I’m making a post about him. He knows nothing about Imgur, or all the other kittens I’ve fostered. He doesn’t realize the family he adopted by adopting Joey. I’m just so happy I get to watch one of my fosters grow up. Such a rarity for me. And to be with a man as amazing as Rich…it’s truly a blessing
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: 21 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 228

Don't let distractions interrupt your flow
March evening facing west, J-Six Ranch, Cochise County, Arizona.
People know and care more about you than you realise
Talking to the people you've lost helps
It's the elites vs the population and always has been.
u/maxinemarx
u/oliviaray17

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @ic3creamninja24 painted these kitties and makes them into stickers! So cool. Check a bunch more in their posts.
27 Man Tax: Jake Nodar from Naked & Afraid
“One love, One heart, Let's get together And feel alright.” - Bob Marley So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: TheLastSpaceman

item.title: Day Five Weigh-In
item.description:
My foster mama cat Bobbie gave birth on Monday and I am weighing her six babies every day to make sure they are gaining weight. 15-20 grams per day is the hope. Let’s do this! (I weighed them out of order but am posting by birth order)
Number One Jaime went from 152 to 160. About half of what we want but still a gain
Number Two Adilene is only up five grams. Not great, and she absolutely refuses to syringe feed so I gotta keep an eye on her.
Number Three, and the runt of the litter Alis, gained 9 grams. For her, that’s pretty good. And she tolerates the syringe feeding so I’ll focus on her tonight.
Number four Ever, the chunky monkey of the group, went from 156 to 174! That’s what I’m talking about!
Number Five Josefina gained 12 grams. So close to the goal!
And Number Six Jorge went from 129 to 141. His biggest gain so far! He sucked down the formula today on my lunch break so I’m sure he’ll go to town tonight, as well.
They all gained. Some more than others, but they ALL gained. I can syringe feed them more now that we’re going into the weekend, so I’m gonna try my best to fatten them all up.
Mama Bobbie allows me to handle them - thank GOD she trusts me - but now she’s got all her babies back with her. I’m gonna go get the formula ready and we’ll see how well the feeding goes. I’ll be back soon, babies! (Oh, and check out the humane society CEO’s latest post. I’m not a dog person, but Spencer is and seeing his work with his animals is inspiring all around: https://imgur.com/gallery/story-of-play-group-ztoeFTR)
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Best Etch A Sketch unboxing ever!
item.description: A few days ago I had the pleasure of chatting with Super Impulse, the company behind the World's Smallest Etch A Sketch (as seen on my necklace). They mailed me a box which I thought would simply contain the new Snoopy edition. I will TREASURE these for the rest of my life!!! You can watch the Super Impulse video here: https://youtu.be/40-xp9jR5Yk?si=lelH7F6DMidqsaS9

item.title: We deserve the fruits of our labor
item.dc:creator: GullahGullahIslander

item.title: Night Five Syringe Feeding
item.description:
I’m supplementing my foster mama cat Bobbie’s milk with formula because even though she is producing milk, six kittens is a lot to feed! Here we go!
Number One Jaime drank the most by far - 10 cc’s!!
Number Two Adilene wants NOTHING to do with it. She hasn’t gained a lot in the past four days so I’m gonna need her to get her shit together.
Number Three Alis is the runt but she drank a bunch of formula earlier and then 5 cc’s just now. I’m getting less and less worried about her as the days go on
Number Six Jorge drank a full syringe and I’m so proud of him!
Number Five Josefina drank a little but then got super sleepy.
Last but not least is Number Four Ever. He was also not super interested but he is the biggest and fattest so I’m not super worried.
Overall, they did really well. Most cc’s eaten so far. Mama Bobbie enjoys cleaning them up haha. I’m really only worried about Adilene because she’s not gaining much and refuses to syringe feed. But she’s NOT losing. I’m holding onto that fact. Anyways, good job everyone!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Big yawns and a LOT of thankfulness
item.description:
I’m chilling in the kitten room and mama Bobbie is killing it, taking care of her babies. BUT I got a knock on my door and came downstairs to meet the mail carrier…
I’m so sorry…WHAT IS THIS??
The mail carrier asked, “Did you do a fundraiser or something?” And I was like, “I just posted my Amazon wish list a couple of times!” Y’all. I don’t even have words. I am so freaking humbled I don’t even know what to say.
Several of the packages are going straight to the humane society, I’m assuming they are the cat litter they so desperately need.
They’re the right shape and weight so I went ahead and loaded them into my car. Spencer, the CEO (@AlabamaAnimalRescuer) is FLOORED with your generosity. As am I.
There are so many yawns happening. They must not realize how blessed they are that so many people are donating to them. I can never thank you enough. I promise every single one of your donations is going directly to these kittens and/or the humane society. Thank you thank you thank you
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.dc:creator: Bruskey

item.title: In a 1996 clip that Oprah Winfrey's people have tried to scrub from the internet, Oprah attempted to forcibly out Nathan Lane on her show. But Robin Williams protected him.
item.description: "I'm not prepared. I'm so scared of going out there and talking to Oprah. I'm not prepared to discuss that I'm gay on national television, I'm not ready,'" Nathan explained on Sunday Sitdown. "And [Robin] said: 'Oh, it's alright, don't worry about it, we don't have to talk about it, we won't talk about it.'" He then recalled how Robin "sort of swoops in and diverts Oprah and goes off on a tangent and protects [him] because he was a saint."
item.dc:creator: Pasquinelthe2nd

item.title: Can’t forget about mama Bobbie
item.description: It’s so easy to focus on the newborn kittens because they’re so tiny and squishy and adorable. But for over two weeks, it was just me and mama Bobbie like 20 hours a day. I took off work for a week and spent every spare minute with her. She is still getting over being attacked by a dog WHILE PREGNANT, and even though her wounds are mostly healed, she still needs a lot of love and attention. I’m obsessed with her eyes. They see straight into my soul. GORGEOUS She’s (probably) a first time mom and she is killing it. The idea of adopting her for real has crossed my mind a few times. Scooty Booty and Madison would kill me but COME ON. Bobbie is perfect. I’ve still got many weeks with her as my foster. I’m gonna appreciate every second.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.description: Kindness should be louder than hate! Source: https://www.youtube.com/@LawnCare-1
item.dc:creator: mocosoft

item.title: GovBrief #421
item.description: Saudi Arabia flew its investment summit to Miami Beach so Donald Trump could keynote it on his way to yet another extended weekend at Mar-a-Lago. Thirteen American troops are dead. Over 300 have been wounded. Gas is up a dollar a gallon and the reasons for starting the war keep changing as fast as the deadlines for ending it. And the country that benefits most from all of it brought its sovereign wealth fund to South Florida, right after Ramadan, with Jared Kushner on stage and Trump bragging that the Saudi crown prince "didn't think he would be kissing my ass." The man who ordered a journalist's dismemberment doesn't let himself be publicly humiliated unless it's worth it. The Saudis knew exactly what they were doing. Billionaires find common ground in places none of us will ever see. Elon Musk, who told the world last year that Donald Trump's name was in the Epstein files, sat in on a phone call this week between Trump and India's prime minister about the Iran war and the Strait of Hormuz. Only the richest of the rich buy access, and they're doing it openly. They don't care if you know or what you think about it. Saturday, in over 3,100 events across all 50 states, tell them there are no kings. Find a way to participate at nokings.org. We've emailed 6,700+ stories over 421 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260327-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/jane-fonda-rally [2] https://go.govbrief.today/musk-trump-modi [3] https://go.govbrief.today/rubio-zelenskyy-lying [4] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-saudi-cuba-iran [5] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar27 [6] https://go.govbrief.today/ks-veto-override [7] https://go.govbrief.today/artemis2-imminent [8] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-promotions [9] https://go.govbrief.today/patel-hacked [10] https://go.govbrief.today/immigrant-attorney-policy [11] https://go.govbrief.today/va-defies-judge [12] https://go.govbrief.today/lyons-ice-stress [13] https://go.govbrief.today/tsa-pay-order [14] https://go.govbrief.today/vance-anti-fraud [15] https://go.govbrief.today/scm-ethics [16] https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-funding-bill [17] https://go.govbrief.today/graves-retires [18] https://go.govbrief.today/dc-airports-second [19] https://go.govbrief.today/chuck-redd-lawsuit [20] https://go.govbrief.today/mn-tuition-dismissal Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
